summary: Fixed the second QA blocker by rejecting unsupported saved DomainEvent schemaVersion values in the sim-core event-tail load parser. Added a valid-checksum regression for schemaVersion 999 on a known event kind and confirmed the loader returns a structured rejection without mutating the current runtime.

tests_run.result: 2 test files passed; 8 tests passed, including valid-checksum unsupported event-tail schemaVersion rejection coverage.
6 test files passed; 32 tests passed. Existing warning only: MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON for tests/fixtures/deterministic-rng-worker.ts.
Node/worker hello hash 61e0ba1c matched; command/query hash d275faa4 matched; save/load hash 28074edd matched; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violation(s).

Root test command passed: architecture check, sim determinism, 13 root Vitest files/53 tests, and web Vitest 1 file/3 tests. Existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning appeared for deterministic-rng-worker.ts.

SIM-005 baseline on m1.abstract-graph-30: 3650 days, finalDay 3650, finalRevision 3650, throughput 9266 days/sec, p50 104100ns, p95 207900ns, p99 278900ns, saveByteLength 9980, save 2163900ns, load 2636200ns.
Recursive workspace typecheck passed, including @monsoon/save-format, @monsoon/sim-core, and apps/web declaration coverage.
All matched files use Prettier code style.
loadSaveV1 returned status rejected with original runtime hash a38362fd and reason invalid-schema at body.eventTail[0].event.schemaVersion; no silent load/coercion.

decisions: Saved DomainEvent tails remain v1-only for SIM-005; unsupported schemaVersion values are rejected rather than migrated or coerced.
The schemaVersion check runs before known-kind-specific event hydration so future/corrupted DTOs cannot be loaded as current v1 events.
risks: Future DomainEvent schema versions will need explicit migration or rejection tests before they can be accepted in save tails.
Existing unrelated project coordination files and route files remain modified/untracked in the worktree from orchestration activity; this fix only touched sim-core parser/tests plus this handoff.
requested_action: Please re-review SIM-005 in qa_reviewer thread 019ef8ff-1fe3-72d1-bf3c-fc44b3a8af37, focusing on unsupported saved DomainEvent schemaVersion rejection, no-mutation behavior, and the updated regression coverage.
